# Fixture: rebecca_workman_travel_distance
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 41.9s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Rebecca! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: I am wanting cleaning and merchandise position don't pay enough for cooking position
Concierge: Shiftsmart partners with companies like Circle K, PepsiCo, and Dollar General. The types of shifts available can vary by location.
Partner: I already did orientation
Concierge: Great — you should be able to see and book shifts in the app.
Partner: Only cooking position they are only work hour and half shifts I'm not traveling 29 miles for that

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
Shift availability varies by day. Keep checking the Shifts tab for cleaning and merchandise shifts — they might open up soon. You can also verify your address in Profile is current so you're seeing nearby options.
